words.meaning_en: The part of the body at the end of the arm
words.example_sentence: She raised her hand to answer the question.
She closed her eyes and fell asleep.
He put his ear to the wall to listen.

words.meaning_en: The part of the face used for smelling and breathing
words.example_sentence: She held her nose because of the bad smell.

words.meaning_en: The opening in the face used for eating and speaking
words.example_sentence: He covered his mouth while coughing.

words.meaning_en: The hard white structures in the mouth used for biting
words.example_sentence: Brush your teeth twice a day.

words.meaning_en: The strands that grow on a person's head
words.example_sentence: She combed her hair before school.

words.meaning_en: The part of the body at the bottom of the leg
words.example_sentence: He hurt his foot while playing.

words.meaning_en: The joint between the arm and the body
words.example_sentence: He carried the bag on his shoulder.

words.meaning_en: The short thick finger at the side of your hand
words.example_sentence: He gave a thumbs-up to show he was happy.

words.meaning_en: The joint connecting the foot and the leg
words.example_sentence: She twisted her ankle while playing.

words.meaning_en: The joint between the hand and the arm
words.example_sentence: He wore a watch on his wrist.

words.meaning_en: The joint in the middle of the arm where it bends
words.example_sentence: He rested his elbow on the table.

words.meaning_en: The joint in the middle of the leg where it bends
words.example_sentence: She hurt her knee during the race.

words.meaning_en: The part of the face above the eyes and below the hair
words.example_sentence: Mother put a tilak on his forehead.

words.meaning_en: A pain felt inside the head
words.example_sentence: She had a headache after reading for a long time.
